title: Korean BBQ Skewers with Crispy Pancetta
description: Sweet and spicy Korean BBQ sauce pairs perfectly with crispy pancetta and marinated vegetables in these mouth-watering skewers.
instructions: Cut the onions, bell peppers, and zucchini into bite-sized pieces.
Alternate vegetables and pancetta on the skewers.
Brush the skewers with Korean BBQ sauce.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
During the last 2 minutes of cooking, brush the skewers with additional Korean BBQ sauce.
Remove the skewers from the grill and serve hot.
Sprinkle with crispy pancetta, if desired.
